productName: Drops 2:1 CBD Heavy Blackberry / Papaya Punch
description: A chef-inspired sweet, ripe blackberry edible with dessert-counter personality, smooth sweetness, and a carefully blended cannabis infusion. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 2:1 ratio. A dessert-style hybrid treat with the kind of flavor that makes dosing feel like a reward.
